title: Race - F1 China Grand Prix - 2026 - FIA Formula 1 World Championship 2026
description: 24 Grand Prix from the Formula 1 Season are live and exclusive only on beIN.All Practices, Qualifiers and Races are available live with a choice of Arabic or English commentary.The 2026 season will consist of 6 Sprint Races within the 24 weekends.For the first time 11 Teams and 22 Drivers will compete to win the World Formula 1 Championships for Drivers and Teams.

title: Newcastle United vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
description: Newcastle United have won their last three home Premier League matches against Manchester United, as many as in their previous 18 combined. The Magpies last had a longer home league winning run against the Red Devils between 1915 and 1931. Man Utd are looking to record a Premier League double over Newcastle for the first time since the 2020-21 campaign; they won 1-0 on Boxing Day thanks to a goal from Patrick Dorgu.

title: Chelsea vs. Newcastle United - English Premier League 2026/2027
description: Chelsea have won 11 of their last 12 Premier League home games against Newcastle since a 2-0 loss in May 2012 under Roberto Di Matteo. Newcastle have avoided defeat in five of their last seven Premier League games against Chelsea, more times than they had in their previous 15.

title: Final - Day 11 - ATP 1000 BNP Paribas Open

title: Sporting CP vs Bodø / Glimt - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
description: With a three-goal deficit from the first leg, Sporting CP are facing what would be just the third time a Portuguese side have been eliminated by a Norwegian opponent in the knockout stages of a major European competition – previously Uniao de Leiria v Molde and Sporting CP themselves v Viking. Bodø/Glimt have a 100% record against Portuguese sides in European competition, with their first leg triumph over Sporting CP being the third different opponent they have beaten.

title: Arsenal vs Bayer Leverkusen - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
description: Arsenal remain unbeaten against Bayer Leverkusen in the UEFA Champions League, with their one victory over them coming on the only occasion they have hosted the German side: 4-1 at Highbury in February 2002. When avoiding defeat away from home in the first leg, Arsenal have progressed from 17 of their 20 two-legged knockout stage ties in major European competition. The latest of those eliminations did come under Mikel Arteta, however, losing on penalties to Sporting CP in the UEFA Europa League round of 16 in 2022-23.

title: Barnsley vs Wigan Athletic - EFL - English Football League SkyBet - League One 2025/2026
description: Live and exclusive action from the EFL (English Football League) One. EFL One is the third-tier in the English football league system. At the end of each season three teams are promoted to the EFL Championship and the four clubs that finished at the bottom of EFL League One are relegated to EFL League Two. The season runs from 8 August 2025 until 2 May 2026.

title: Paris vs Toulouse - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
description: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germains 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

title: Qatar SC vs Al Gharafa - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W18
description: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

description: لا تفوتوا أهم تحليلات المباريات مع الخبراء الفنيين والمحللين الرياضيين، بالإضافة إلى معرفة آراء اللاعبين والمدربين... وأهم الأخبار الكروية وأروع الأهداف خلال الموسم.
